generated_from: live query of problems.starter_code JSON across all 216 problems (2026-07-07)
notes: Program Mode (stdin/stdout) starter code is functionally unstarted for 16/17 languages -- this is a completely separate gap from Function Mode adapter coverage. Every language's Program Mode RUNNER (execution primitive) exists in notebook.py's RUNNERS dict and works today (confirmed via direct read: all 17 keys present); what's missing is the per-problem PER-LANGUAGE boilerplate (imports, stdin parsing scaffold, TODO body) a real user would see in the editor.

The single javascript row is very likely a leftover from an early Function-Mode-era backfill script targeting one specific problem, not the start of a systematic Program Mode effort -- needs confirmation before building on top of it.
Building this out requires a deterministic per-language generator driven by each problem's I/O shape (mission Phase 22-24), not 216 x 16 hand-written files.
This is entirely separate from and does not block Function Mode scaling work.
